productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Grey & Black Pyjama Set
description: Style NoteWe love this cute pyjama set from little miss intimates which has a girly vibe and keeps you feeling young. Bright colours with cartoon prints, immensely comfortable and super soft fabric makes this just what you want to go to to sleep in or spend a day lounging at home. Product DetailsGrey spaghetti top, has a round neckline, black printed binding around the arm holes and straps, graphic print on the chest in pink and silver with sequinned detail, black contrast stitched detail at the neckline and hemline. Printed shorts with elasticated waist and is tag-less.Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dry or iron on print
